name: Big Ridge Gold Corp.
summary: Big Ridge Gold Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of gold projects in Canada. It holds interests in the Oxford Lake property that includes 17 mineral claims and three mineral exploration licenses, which combined cover approximately 35,992 hectares located in Manitoba; and the Destiny project that comprises 127 mineral claims totaling 5,013 hectares located in Quebec. The company is also exploring in the Beardmore-Geraldton gold belt in Ontario. The company was formerly known as Alto Ventures Ltd. and changed its name to Big Ridge Gold Corp. in September 2020. Big Ridge Gold Corp. was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
